text:
FreeBSD spock 10.0-RELEASE-p2 FreeBSD 10.0-RELEASE-p2 #0: Tue Apr 29 17:06:01 UTC 2014     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

How-To-Repeat: - Install security/gnutls3
- Delete, or don't install security/gnutls
- Configure irc/weechat with GNUTLS=on, then try to build.
